response.overview: When two criminals target what appears to be an ordinary suburban home, they find themselves caught in a chaotic storm of betrayal, secrets, and deadly miscalculations. As a robbery turns into a hostage standoff, hidden affairs, drug ties, and a dark past unravel - revealing that the people they thought were victims may be more dangerous than they are. In a night filled with unexpected twists, loyalty is tested, blood is spilled, and survival is the only rule left standing.
response.title: Home Invasion
